name: Belen Community Center In Eagle Park
description: Belen Community Center In Eagle Park is a place to play pickleball in Belen, NM. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Daniel Fernandez Recreation Center
description: Daniel Fernandez Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Los Lunas, NM. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Huning Ranch Park
description: Come play pickleball at Huning Ranch Park in Los Lunas, NM! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights.
